relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Jesus sees rich gifts entering the treasury.
He also sees the poor widow’s two small coins.
Her small gift is named greater than all.
She gives from lack, her whole living.
Temple beauty becomes the occasion for warning.
The stones will not remain stacked in permanence.
The disciples ask when and what sign.
The first command is not to be led astray.
Wars and disturbances are not yet the immediate end.
Nations and reigns rise against each other.
Earth and heaven shake with signs.
Witness will happen under pressure before rulers.
Pressure becomes testimony.
The heart is told not to pre-script defense.
Wisdom and mouth will be given.
Even close bonds may hand disciples over.
Hatred comes because of the name.
Not a hair is forgotten in divine keeping.
Endurance becomes the way to gain life.
Jerusalem surrounded reveals desolation near.
Urgency requires flight, not possession retrieval.
Written reckoning is fulfilled.
The vulnerable are named with grief.
Jerusalem is trampled until the nations’ times are fulfilled.
Sun, moon, stars, sea, and nations speak distress.
Fear rises as heavenly powers shake.
The Son of Humanity comes in cloud with power and glory.
When shaking begins, lift your heads because redemption nears.
The fig tree teaches discernment.
Leaves reveal the nearness of summer.
So signs reveal the nearness of the Divine reign.
This generation is inside the unfolding.
His words outlast heaven and earth.
Hearts must not be weighed down by excess, numbness, or anxiety.
The day comes over the face of the earth.
Stay awake and pray for strength to stand before the Son of Humanity.
He teaches by day and lodges by night on Olivet.
The people come early to hear him in the temple.
